# Tests currently expected to pass under tests/stub.
# CI fails if any of these stops passing (regression).
# Add lines as we fix more; remove with reason in commit msg.
# Sorted alphabetically. Refresh with bin/refresh-testkit-baseline stub.
# Tests known to fail in CI for env reasons live in
# .github/testkit-stub-baseline-exclude.txt and are skipped here.

test_all_slow_connection (tests.stub.iteration.test_iteration_session_run.TestIterationSessionRun.test_all_slow_connection)
test_direct (tests.stub.connectivity_check.test_verify_connectivity.TestVerifyConnectivity.test_direct)
test_direct_no_server (tests.stub.connectivity_check.test_verify_connectivity.TestVerifyConnectivity.test_direct_no_server)
test_direct_raises_error (tests.stub.connectivity_check.test_verify_connectivity.TestVerifyConnectivity.test_direct_raises_error)
test_discards_on_session_close (tests.stub.iteration.test_iteration_session_run.TestIterationSessionRun.test_discards_on_session_close)
test_obtain_summary_twice (tests.stub.versions.test_versions.TestProtocolVersions.test_obtain_summary_twice)
test_routing (tests.stub.connectivity_check.test_verify_connectivity.TestVerifyConnectivity.test_routing)
